ModelConfig.formDescription: Create a new agent model and set-up the parameters
ModelConfig.fieldCodeDescription: A short description for the Agent Model
ModelConfig.fieldAPIKeyPlaceholder: (Optional) API key. If not provided, the keys in the env.local will be used
ModelConfig.fieldTemperaturePlaceholder: Controls randomness (0-2). Higher values make output more random.
ModelConfig.fieldMaxTokensPlaceholder: Maximum number of tokens to generate
ModelConfig.fieldEnableReasoningAnthropic: Enable extended thinking for more thoughtful responses
ModelConfig.fieldEnableReasoningOther: Enable reasoning mode for complex problem solving
ModelConfig.fieldInterleavedThinkingDescription: Allow thinking to be interleaved with responses (experimental)
ModelConfig.fieldReasoningEffortDescription: Amount of reasoning effort to apply
ModelConfig.modelSectionDescriptionPart1: Optional parameters to control model behavior
ModelConfig.modelSectionDescriptionPart2: (If left blank the model standards are used)
